perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women are standing in a Costco warehouse aisle in front of a giant inflatable Minion; one woman wears a white top and a patterned bucket hat, the other wears a black beret and a brown sheer top. (2) They hold up and demonstrate several inflatable costume boxes, including a Super Mario ride-on and a Minecraft pig ride-on, while gesturing and smiling. (3) The camera pans and zooms in on the back of the inflatable Minion to show the air intake fan and the interior entry point. (4) The woman in the black beret examines the size chart on the Super Mario box closely while listening to an off-camera speaker.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music plays throughout. A female voice begins introducing the large Minion and costumes with high energy. (2) An off-camera male voice joins the conversation, making a joke about 'Hog Rider' when the Minecraft pig is shown. (3) The two women and the off-camera man continue a humorous dialogue about the costume's size and whether an adult could fit inside. Ambient warehouse noise, such as distant chatter and shopping carts, is audible in the background.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles are provided at the bottom of the screen to translate the dialogue. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: A large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is fixed at the top. Colorful, variety-show style captions appear including '超可愛的巨大小小兵' (Super cute giant Minion), '穿身上 899元' (Wear on body 899 NTD), and '野豬騎士來啦~' (Hog rider is here~) with a playful, excited tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro to products -> Demonstration of variety -> Detailed look at features -> Discussion on size

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female hosts, 1 male shopper in background, 2 female shoppers in background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman with long dark hair, a black beret, and a brown sheer top; another woman with long dark hair, a patterned bucket hat, and a white off-the-shoulder top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse featuring industrial high-shelf racking, pallets of boxed toys (Minecraft, Super Mario), and shoppers with carts in the distance.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Showcase Item A -> Showcase Item B -> Detail Investigation -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lifestyle vlog and product recommendation piece, aimed at sharing interesting and 'cute' new merchandise found at Costco. By demonstrating the scale and features of the inflatable costumes, the creators provide a combination of entertainment and consumer information to their audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly names the store (Costco), shows price tags, and provides a detailed demonstration of specific brands (Minecraft, Mario) available there.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Humorous banter between the female hosts and an off-screen male camera operator.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: High-quality vertical video production typical of influencers who specialize in retail 'finds' and lifestyle content.
